title: Zimin Lu
compiled_truth: Zimin Lu is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-01-28), Zimin Lu sent 147 and received 427 emails, totalling 574 interactions. Top correspondents: [Stinson Gibner](people/stinson-gibner) (110), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (105), [Bob Lee](people/bob-lee) (17), [Alex Huang](people/alex-huang) (13), [Paulo Issler](people/paulo-issler) (10). Mailbox folders observed: c, calendar, deleted_items, inbox, market, resumes.
